summary: Adds deterministic blocked-cascade daemon-repair regression coverage for tranche 27 item 4.
target_task: Task checkbox-353: Add generated blocked-cascade daemon-repair coverage for tranche 27 item 4 proving blocked PP&D work stays parked until a fresh daemon repair task validates.
validation_commands: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
